# CWE-798 — Use of Hard-coded Credentials
# Catalogue entry: 1Password Service-Account Token
# Provider: onepassword    Rule id (normalized): 1password.1
#
# Detected by this rule:
#   - kingfisher  kingfisher.1password.1
#   - titus       kingfisher.1password.1
#
# Pattern: (?xi) \b ( ops_eyj[A-Za-z0-9_-]{80,500} ) \b
#
# Fake credentials from scanner test corpora — safe to commit, not live secrets.

export OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN=ops_
